title: May 25, 2026
sentiment: Even the best secrets are built to be shared — and in that trust, something worth protecting becomes worth building.

stories.title: How Shamir's Secret Sharing Works
stories.summary: A clear walkthrough of Shamir's scheme — how a secret can be divided into N shares so that any K of them reconstruct it, but no smaller number reveals anything.

stories.title: Exit IP VPN servers mitigation rollout
stories.summary: Mullvad transparently documents how they tracked down and mitigated an exit node IP leak — a model for honest, technical accountability in privacy infrastructure.

stories.title: Ask HN: What side project did you work on this week?
stories.summary: A weekly ritual of makers sharing what they built — the kind of quiet, distributed trust in craft that keeps the internet interesting.
